name: Animosity
description: Animosity is a Maliwan pistol that can roll with a Torgue barrel. This boosts base impact well above typical Maliwan pistols, but usually trades off accuracy, fire rate and reload speed. Handling varies a lot with parts, and its projectiles also gain extra value from splash damage scaling.
notes: It deals bonus splash damage that can be increased by grenade damage bonuses, so certain builds can greatly raise its burst potential.
